title: 1.1: Tests that FromData populates cache with unverified results when verify is false and forceCacheUpdate is true
1.2: Tests that FromData returns cached verification results when all results have cache hits
1.3: Tests that FromData triggers re-verification when cache miss occurs
1.4: Tests that FromData updates cache when forceCacheUpdate is true even with existing cache entries
1.5: Tests that cache keys distinguish between same Raw credential with different DetectorType
1.6: Tests that cache keys distinguish between same RawV2 credential with different DetectorType
2.1: Places the tests for verification cache FromData scenarios in pkg/verificationcache/
3.1: All tests use the Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern TestVerificationCache_FromData_<Scenario>
3.3: All tests use testify assertions (assert/require packages)
3.4: All tests use the testDetector helper struct for mocking detector behavior
4.1: Uses InMemoryMetrics struct to verify metric updates for tests that check cache behavior metrics
4.2: Uses simple.NewCache[detectors.Result]() for cache instantiation in cache-enabled tests
